user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new client with name, creation date, billable flag, email and address, so that the client is available for resource assignments
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Client Master screen; When I click Add / Edit client and fill in the client details; Then the new client is saved and appears in the client list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing client's details, so that client information stays accurate
acceptance_criteria: Given a client is listed on the Client Master screen; When I click Edit and update the details; Then the changes are saved and reflected in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to search for a client by name, so that I can quickly find a specific client among many
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Client Master screen; When I enter a client name and click Search; Then only matching clients are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to reset the search filters, so that I can return to the full client list
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied a search on the Client Master screen; When I click Reset; Then all filters clear and the full client list is shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to flag whether a client is always non-billable, so that billing rules are applied correctly during assignments
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding or editing a client; When I set the "Is this client always non-billable" option; Then the flag is saved and shown in the client list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through the client list, so that I can browse all 225 clients efficiently
acceptance_criteria: Given the Client Master list has multiple pages; When I use the pagination controls; Then the corresponding page of clients is displayed
